shops.description: Beautiful traditional Ethiopian clothing, habesha kemis, and modern fusion wear.
shops.address: Bole Road, near Edna Mall, Addis Ababa
shops.fullDescription: Founded in 2010, Habesha Traditional Fashion has grown from a small shop to a recognized brand. We offer custom tailoring services for weddings and special occasions.

shops.description: Fresh Ethiopian coffee beans, organic spices, and traditional coffee sets.
shops.address: Meskel Square, behind the flower shop, Addis Ababa
shops.fullDescription: Addis Coffee & Spice connects Ethiopian coffee farmers directly with coffee lovers. We source the finest Yirgacheffe, Sidama, and Harrar coffee beans.
